betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Funny looking tooltip. The stellar forge sure is fun to passive, right?

You're going to want a lot of heavy quarks right now, and a lot of gluons later. It's important to ensure that you don't run out of either, as some processes (like QCD charges) depend on having a significant quantity of one or the other. Maybe consider a crafting card and dummy items? Or you can dedicate a star forge to it.
